headline: Dollar General earnings beat: How high-income consumers factor in
summary: Dollar General (DG) reported first quarter earnings that beat Wall Street's estimates. The company also raised its full-year profit outlook.  Loop Capital Markets managing director and consumer sector head Anthony Chukumba and UBS US hardline and broadline and food retail analyst Michael Lasser chat with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman about the earnings results and the state of the consumer.

headline: Tariff-Driven Inflation Is Trapping Mortgage Rates, and the Fed Can’t Fix It with Rate Cuts
summary: On a recent Rich Habits Podcast segment, market commentator Ron Santella put it bluntly: “The playbook from last week hasn’t changed. It’s actually gotten more entrenched. Higher for longer is the base case.” For households waiting on a refinance or a first home purchase, he was even more direct: “Today’s report tells you it’s not ... Tariff-Driven Inflation Is Trapping Mortgage Rates, and the Fed Can’t Fix It with Rate Cuts

headline: Sridhar Ramaswamy, Snowflake CEO: A Fortt Knox Update
summary: Snowflake CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy joins Jon Fortt on day one of Snowflake Summit 26 in San Francisco, fresh off a Q1 FY2027 print that pushed product growth back above 30%. He unveils the show's headline products — Snowflake CoWork and Coco, two agent control planes positioned as the cockpit for business and engineering work — and lays out his 'impact maxing' framework: AI has to make money or save money, not just burn tokens for the sake of it.
